creator: saitchison@borderware.com
text:
If IP_PORTRANGE_HIGH is set as a socket option, it will set INP_PORTHIGH
on inp_flags.  However, since INP_ONESBCAST is the same value and is also
set in inp_flags, this will cause some problems with UDP checksums on these
sockets.

This was fixed previously in kern/87306, however it was reintroduced in
kern/99558

How-To-Repeat: Call setsockopt() with IP_PORTRANGE_HIGH on a UDP socket.  Send traffic
through socket.
